decision: Keep ComputeSystemMetrics and ComputeGlobalLeaderboard in analytics/service.go boundary and refactor only DTO/repository/test responsibilities in the scoped analytics files
reason: Task notes explicitly require preserving analytics/service.go as the boundary owner while aligning unchecked analytics symbols with SRP
impact: Repository setup, metric value access, and scoped tests were improved without moving orchestration logic out of the service boundary.
